calendar.matters:
Petition To Remove Cotrustee And Appoint Successor Cotrustee
Off Calendar Aug-24-2015 Granted Per Written Order

Petition To Remove Cotrustee And Appoint Successor Cotrustee
Off Calendar Aug-03-2015 Continued To Aug-24-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Vaught for Petitioner Union Bank of California
Mr. Vaught advised the Court that he had received a telephone call from John Andrews, in which he was advised that Mr. Andrews may or may not appear telephonically to raise objections to the petition. There was a problem with the CourtCall connection which was preventing its use in Department 204. The Court inquired if the matter was time sensitive, and Mr. Vaught replied that it was not. The hearing on the Petition to Remove Co-Trustee and Appoint Successor Co-Trustee was continued to August 24, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mr. Andrews shall file and submit to the Court any objections to the granting of the Petition by August 17, 2015. Thereafter the Court shall advise the parties if the matter has been deemed submitted, or if the hearing shall go forth on August 24th.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Craig Blackstone/Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not reported)
